security_meaning: Connection length — long durations may indicate tunnelling
Network protocol — ICMP often used in ping floods
Destination service — unusual services flag recon/exploits
TCP status — S0 (no reply) and REJ are strong attack signals
Data sent — zero bytes typical in SYN floods
Data received — extreme values indicate exfiltration
Root shell obtained — U2R critical indicator
SYN error rate — primary SYN flood / DoS indicator
REJ error rate — firewall-blocked connection indicator
Host connection count — host-level scan density
Host SYN error accumulation — persistent DoS
Host REJ error rate — blocked connection history
Derived target variable for binary classification
